subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God who art sorrowful in this ephemeral dust-heap! Permanence for any soul in this transitory realm is impossible and beyond the pale of doubt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله محزونه در این خاکدان فانی بقا بجهت نفسی ممتنع و محال و مجال شبهه
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
